name: Armed Dragon, the Armored Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よろい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アームド・ドラゴン－
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower WIND Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Armed Dragon, the Armored Dragon", but it cannot attack directly this turn.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower WIND Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Armed Dragon, the Armored Dragon", but it cannot attack directly this turn.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or lower WIND Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Armed Dragon, the Armored Dragon", but it cannot attack directly this turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
